title: astragalus glycyphyllos
intro: Astragalus glycyphyllos, also known as milk vetch or Chinese milk vetch, is a perennial legume plant native to China and Eastern Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus glycyphyllos include enhancing immune function, reducing inflammation, and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Astragalus glycyphyllos is often used in teas, tinctures, capsules, and infusions, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
